role_summary: the treasury manager manages liquidity, investments, and financial risk to optimize returns  and ensure funding stability.
responsibilities: • manage cash flow, liquidity, and funding requirements   • oversee investments, borrowings, and interest rate risk   • monitor forex exposure and hedging strategies   • ensure compliance with rbi and treasury regulations   • prepare treasury mis and risk reports   • coordinate with banks, investors, and regulators
qualifications: • ca with treasury and financial markets exposure   • strong understanding of risk management and derivatives   • analytical and strategic thi nking skills
